subcodes.title: Seal of Baha’u’llah #10
subcodes.first_line: From the horizon of the decree has dawned a sun on which the most glorious pen has inscribed:  The prison belongs to the dawning-place of the verses
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت من افق القضاء شمس رقم علیها من القلم الابهی السجن لمطلع الایات الذی
